message:
chore(audit): record batches 428-429 (unix stream fix, backfill, remaining files)

Batch 428: Unix stream missing NotConnected handler (1 FIXED).
TCP stream, websocket/close, virtual_tcp, dns/lookup — all SOUND.

Batch 429: Backfill 17 previously-audited files into audit_index.
New audits: io_driver, deadline_monitor, record/task, h1/types,
service/service, obligation/choreography/pipeline — 6 files, all SOUND.

Grand total: 39 bugs fixed, 240+ files audited, ~310K+ lines (~99%).
